overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long dark dress walking through a gothic castle courtyard at dusk. The scene features wet cobblestone paths, medieval cathedral architecture with spires, scattered pedestrians, and a misty atmosphere with street lamps illuminating the purple-hued sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the main cathedral building between weathered stone walls

tall weathered stone wall with rough texture
massive gothic cathedral with twin spires and ornate facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor flanked by walls and a gargoyle statue, emerging into an open plaza. The massive gothic cathedral looms ahead in the misty dusk, illuminated by warm street lamps against the purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle plaza with cathedral facade

events.description: character turns left to follow the path along the cathedral side
passing other pedestrians walking in the plaza

agents.ego_description: turning left to walk along the side of the cathedral, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat walking past the character

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with crenellated top
misty mountains visible behind the castle complex

segments.scene_description: Crossing the open plaza, the character turns left to follow the cathedral's edge. A round tower appears on the left while the main cathedral shifts to the right side of the frame. Other pedestrians walk through the misty courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path along cathedral wall with garden hedges

events.description: pedestrian passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking view
stone fountain comes into view in the garden area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the path with the cathedral wall on the right and manicured garden hedges on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian passing closely by on the left side of the path

entered.detail: tall trimmed hedge row lining the cobblestone path
detailed gothic stonework with arched windows
tiered stone fountain with circular basin

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the cathedral's side wall with lush garden hedges on the left. A stone fountain appears in the distance ahead as the character passes other pedestrians on the wet cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle garden area with central fountain and distant spires

events.description: character passes the fountain, continuing along the curved garden path

agents.ego_description: walking past the fountain area in the castle gardens, heading toward the distant spire

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead near the fountain

entered.detail: tall pointed spire of another castle building in the distance
landscaped garden area with flowers and shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character rounds the corner of the cathedral, which now appears on the left, and walks past the stone fountain. The path continues through the gardens toward a distant spire, with the main cathedral receding behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor into an expansive, misty gothic courtyard at dusk. It begins by trailing the character past a gargoyle statue and through a narrow passage, emerging into an open plaza where a massive cathedral looms under a purple sky. As the character crosses the plaza and turns left, the perspective shifts to reveal a round tower and other pedestrians drifting through the mist. The scene then opens further along the cathedral's side wall, passing lush garden hedges and wet cobblestones before approaching a distant stone fountain. Finally, the camera rounds the corner of the cathedral as it recedes into the background, following the path through the gardens toward a solitary, distant spire.
